'''Naneb Pefan''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] trader and co-pilot.

==Biography==
As a trader, Naneb Pefan obtained a good amount of experience and skill, being supposedly able to sell sand on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Pefan was then hired by the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] merchant [[Vacasor]] to co-pilot his [[3-Z light freighter|ship]], the ''[[Merasy]]''. While Vacasor was a poor trader, he remained in business though the considerable business skills of Pefan. For example, Vacasor neglected the maintenance of his ship but insisted on exploring routes with little security and high piracy; Pefan was the one insisting on replacing the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] of the ship.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
